features: 【100% Natural Fiber】 AIDEA Compressed facial sponges are made from 100% natural cellulose fibers, which are typically derived from sustainable plant sources like wood pulp. Ensuring the face pads are biodegradable and free from synthetic materials, making them an environmentally conscious choice for your skincare routine. They are gentle on the skin, and the absence of artificial additives reduces the risk of skin irritations. Your esthetician essentials.

【Long-Lasting & Reusable】These makeup remover pads, when hydrated, can absorb and retain a significant amount of water or liquid. This property is especially useful for facial cleansing and skincare routines. Simply rinse them thoroughly after each use and allow them to air dry, and it can be used again. This ensures that they remain clean and free from bacteria. This reusability not only makes them a cost-effective choice but also aligns with eco-friendly and sustainable beauty practices.

【Multi-Purpose】AIDEA Makeup Facial Cleansing Pads are versatile and serve multiple purposes in your beauty and skincare routine. You can use them for various tasks, including cleansing, exfoliation, applying skincare products, makeup removal, applying facial masks, etc. Their soft texture won't scratch or damage your skin.

【Portable】Total 96-count cellulose facial sponges. The portability of these face wash sponges adds to their convenience and versatility. Their compact size and lightweight nature make them easy to carry in your makeup bag, travel kit, or gym bag. Allows you to maintain your skincare and beauty routine on the go. Whether you're traveling, going to the gym, or need a quick touch-up during the day, these sponges are designed to be your portable and reliable beauty companions.

【Support for Green Beauty】AIDEA cellulose facial cleansing sponges are typically made from natural cellulose, which is derived from renewable plant sources. Choosing these eco-friendly facial sponges is a way to support the growing green beauty movement, which focuses on products and practices that are safe for both people and the planet. By choosing AIDEA cellulose facial pads, you're making an environmentally responsible choice.
description: Product description AIDEA compressed facial sponges are made from natural cellulose, which is derived from plant sources like wood pulp or cotton. This material is biodegradable and sustainable, making it an eco-friendly choice for your beauty routine. AIDEA Makeup Remover Pads are designed to provide a mild exfoliating effect, helping to remove dead skin cells, dirt, and makeup residue. Their texture is soft and non-abrasive, suitable for all skin types. Due to their natural composition, cellulose sponges are hypoallergenic and less likely to cause skin irritations or allergic reactions. This makes them a safe choice for people with sensitive or reactive skin. They can be used for a variety of skincare and beauty applications. They are great for cleansing, removing makeup, applying skincare products, and even for facial masks. These Cleansing Pads are often affordable and long-lasting. With proper care, they can be used repeatedly, offering great value for your skincare and beauty regimen. The compact package design makes them a travel-friendly choice for women. Directions 1. Hydrate the compressed facial sponge by submerging it in water until it expands to its full size. 2. Gently squeeze out excess water, ensuring the sponge remains damp. 3. Use the sponge for facial cleansing, exfoliation, applying skincare products, or removing makeup. 4. After use, rinse the sponge thoroughly and allow it to air dry. 5. Replace the sponge when it shows signs of wear or contamination. Safety Warning NO See more
